sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: File In Suspicious Location Encoded To Base64 Via Certutil.EXE
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the execution of certutil with the "encode" flag to encode a file to base64 where the files are located in potentially suspicious locations

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious File Encoded To Base64 Via Certutil.EXE
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the execution of certutil with the "encode" flag to encode a file to base64 where the extensions of the file is suspicious
Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: File Encoded To Base64 Via Certutil.EXE
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the execution of certutil with the "encode" flag to encode a file to base64. This can be abused by threat actors and attackers for data exfiltration
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Once established within a system or network, an adversary may use automated techniques for collecting internal data.

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: File And SubFolder Enumeration Via Dir Command
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects usage of the "dir" command part of Widows CMD with the "/S" command line flag in order to enumerate files in a specified directory and all subdirectories.

attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows
